controls.label: Broken or changed source fallback
controls.detail: If source status is uncertain, public actions should fall back to official court source pages.

controls.label: Approved PDF delivery control
controls.detail: Reviewed PDFs can be viewed and downloaded on site through approved court-source delivery. Cached copies remain disabled.

controls.label: On-site calculator control
controls.detail: MFLG child-support and maintenance calculators are enabled on site with official-source fallback.

controls.label: Sensitive data control
controls.detail: Forms & Tools carries only starting-point selections and routes detailed facts to Guided Intake review.

public_message: Forms & Tools is monitored for official-source health. MFLG calculators are available on site; cached downloads and unreviewed items remain controlled.
